home.heroTag: Write your year into a book.
home.showcaseLine: Not a year-end review — a book about you.
home.sSub:
The year is ending
Some things worth keeping
home.sSumA1: Went to Dali, stayed by the lake...
home.sSumA3: March to May, doubting my path...
home.yoyQ:
If you could go back to January,
what would you tell yourself?
home.yoy2024: Don’t be afraid. Everything you thought you couldn’t survive — you did.
home.yoy2025: Think less, do more. You’re braver than you think.
home.yoy2026: It’s okay to go slow. Your own pace is enough.
home.endingTitle:
What would you like
to say this year?
